flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Klamath Community College fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (17.7% → 10.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Klamath Community College rose 30% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.4k → $17.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Klamath Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $8.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Klamath Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.0k).
